name: Murala Doni Sravanth Gowd
tagline: Passionate about precision engineering and product development with hands-on experience in CAD design and 3D modeling.
bio: Mechanical Engineer specializing in CAD/CAM, seeking challenging opportunities to apply my technical skills in a dynamic organization. Seeking a challenging, growth-oriented opportunity in a dynamic organization where I can leverage my skills to contribute to the success of the team and achieve both personal and organizational goals.
